author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Decision: Implementing PyTorch's exact architecture:
1. Fused GRU forward PTX kernel: takes pre-computed input_gates [B,3H] + hidden_gates [B,3H] + bias + hx → produces hy + workspace
2. Fused GRU backward PTX kernel: takes workspace + grad_hy → produces grad_input_gates + grad_hidden_gates + grad_hx
3. Wire into GpuBackend trait as fused_gru_cell_f32 / fused_gru_cell_backward_f32
4. Restructure GRU::forward to: (a) compute input/hidden gates via mm, (b) call fused kernel for pointwise, (c) save workspace for backward

The GEMMs stay as cuBLAS calls. Only the pointwise gate logic is fused.
